package perflayers

import (
    "fmt"
    "regexp"
    "time"
)

func HandleRequestPattern(input string) *regexp.Regexp {
    return regexp.MustCompile(input)
}

func FormatSimpleConcat(a, b string) string {
    // simple concat
    return fmt.Sprintf("%s:%s", a, b)
}

func AppendWithoutKnownCapacity(items []int) []int {
    var out []int
    for _, item := range items {
        out = append(out, item)
    }
    return out
}

func TickerNotStoppedOnExit() {
    ticker := time.NewTicker(time.Second)
    _ = ticker
}
